title: Shine Upon Us

sections.label: Intro
lines: (A D G Em)

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: O Shepherd of light, lead us home,
From the shadows where we roam.
Restore the branches, broken and bare,
Let Your mercy fill the air.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: Hear our cry through the endless night,
Turn Your face, make the darkness bright.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Shine upon us, bring us life again,
Lift the veil, let Your love descend.
Awake our hearts, let Your glory rise,
Turn again, O God, hear our cries.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Once we flourished, roots so deep,
Through the valleys, now we weep.
Let Your power heal what’s torn,
Make us whole, reborn.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: Hear our cry through the endless night,
Turn Your face, make the darkness bright.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Shine upon us, bring us life again,
Lift the veil, let Your love descend.
Awake our hearts, let Your glory rise,
Turn again, O God, hear our cries.

sections.label: Bridge
lines: Oh, Shepherd, will You guide us still?
Through the silence, bend Your will.
Restore the years the locust stole,
Light the fire within our souls.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Shine upon us, bring us life again,
Lift the veil, let Your love descend.
Awake our hearts, let Your glory rise,
Turn again, O God, hear our cries.

sections.label: Outro
lines: Shine upon us, let Your love remain,
Guide us through this endless plain.

epigraph: and cause thy face to shine
styleNote: Subdued Drums Enter Gently · Builds With Gentle Percussion · Shimmering Guitar Textures
